title: Evolution Findings
description: Output from the analyze step of pipeline-evolve: classified failure signal aggregated from pipeline_eval rows for a target pipeline.

pipeline_name.description: Target pipeline whose history was analyzed

status.description: analyzed when at least one row was present; insufficient_data when no eval rows were available

judge_score_median.description: Median judge_score across the sample, or null if no scored runs

retry_count_avg.description: Mean retry count across the sample

failure_classes.description: Top recurring failure classes with counts, capped to top 10

class.description: Failure class label as recorded in pipeline_eval.failure_class

count.description: Number of occurrences in the sample

share.description: Fraction of sample attributable to this class

recurring_symptoms.description: Free-form natural-language symptom labels extracted by the analyzer
